Description: Graduation report year (2010–2025). Represents the school year ending in that calendar year (e.g., 2025 = the 2024-25 school year).
NYS county name in uppercase (e.g., WESTCHESTER, ALBANY). Null for statewide and NRC aggregation rows.
NYS 2-digit county code (1–68). Null for statewide and NRC aggregation rows. See county_codes section of the documentation.
School district name. Null for statewide, NRC, and county aggregation rows. Also null for years without district-level data (2010–2012, 2014).
12-digit BEDS code uniquely identifying the school district. Null at aggregation levels above district. Also null for years without district-level data (2010–2012, 2014).
School name. Populated only for school-level rows. Null for all other aggregation levels and for years without school-level data (2010–2012, 2014).
Numeric code identifying the demographic subgroup (1–29). See subgroup_codes section of the documentation.
Canonical name of the demographic subgroup corresponding to Sub_Group_Code.
Count of students in the graduation cohort (enrollment). Null when suppressed for student privacy (fewer than 5 students).
Count of students who earned a Regents or Local diploma. Null when suppressed for student privacy.
Count of students who dropped out. Null when suppressed for student privacy.
Count of students who transferred to an approved high school equivalency (GED) preparation program. Null when suppressed for student privacy.
